rationale: Educ. Code §31.152 governs rebates and gifts to school personnel regarding instructional materials. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A school trustee, administrator, or teacher commits an offense if that person receives any commission or rebate on any instructional materials or technological equipment used in the schools with which the person is associated as a trustee, administrator, or teacher.
_note: No conflict: the cited rule addresses ethics/rebates for school personnel, not property tax homestead exemptions.
